description: Workflow to process pet entity data through various processing steps
name: pet_processing_workflow

transitions.description: Start processing pet entity by adding metadata
transitions.end_state_description: Metadata has been added or updated
transitions.name: start_processing

transitions.description: Normalize the pet name to title case
transitions.end_state_description: Pet name normalized to title case
transitions.name: name_normalization
transitions.start_state_description: Metadata has been added or updated

transitions.description: Ensure tags list and add default tag if none
transitions.end_state_description: Tags list ensured and default tag added if empty
transitions.name: tags_processing
transitions.start_state_description: Pet name normalized to title case

transitions.description: Perform async side effects or enrichment
transitions.end_state_description: Async side effects or enrichment completed
transitions.name: async_side_effects
transitions.start_state_description: Tags list ensured and default tag added if empty
